Sandbox_IsThriller_Range_tooltip: Surround detection radius. The event may trigger if there are enough zombies within this distance and the player is in combat (either targeted or attacking). During the event, zombie movement speeds within this range will be recalculated.
Sandbox_IsThriller_SprintChance_tooltip: The chance that a zombie turns into a sprinter when entering the range. Those who fail the roll become fast shamblers.
Sandbox_IsThriller_MaxZombies_tooltip: During the music intro, the maximum number of additional extra zombies spawned per minute outside the player's line of sight (randomized between 2 and this value, spawning from the edge of the gathering radius).
Sandbox_IsThriller_MaxDancer_tooltip: The number of special backup dancer zombies that appear alongside MJ when the Thriller stage performance begins. Set to 0 for a random amount between 2 and 5. Note: Dancers have higher stats than normal zombies and possess health regeneration, so prepare accordingly.
Sandbox_IsThriller_EventChance_tooltip: The probability of triggering a Thriller event per in-game minute when zombies are nearby. Chance is doubled at night. 1 = 0.1% chance. Since this is checked every minute, keep this value low if you do not want it to trigger too frequently.
Sandbox_IsThriller_EventCooldown_tooltip: Once a Thriller stage event successfully ends, this is the number of in-game hours that must pass before another can trigger.
Sandbox_IsThriller_MaxWave_tooltip: The number of songs played during a single Thriller stage event. After playing this amount, the stage enters its outro and fades out. The maximum spawn wave of extras during the intro is twice the number of songs; adjust as needed.
Sandbox_IsThriller_MusicOptionsDivider_t: You can select multiple tracks. When a Thriller event triggers, a random song from the selected list will play. This option is only a divider and has no effect. If left empty, all tracks are enabled by default. If a music expansion mod is installed, those tracks will also be added to the combat playlist.
Sandbox_IsThriller_JustBeatIt_tooltip: Plays Beat It when MJ appears.
Sandbox_IsThriller_JustSmoothCriminal_to: Plays Smooth Criminal when MJ appears.
Sandbox_IsThriller_NoBodyCanBeatMeInBGM: No One Can Beat Me in My BGM
Sandbox_IsThriller_NoBodyCanBeatMeInBGM_: Changes the mod mode so that entering combat merely plays a random or selected MJ track and grants an extra buff lasting 15 in-game minutes, instead of triggering a special horde event.
